added_items.final_wording: Supports anxiety and worry history, duration, distress, functional impairment, comorbid depression or anxiety, substance use, medical and treatment history, education, and active monitoring.

source.title: Generalised anxiety disorder and panic disorder in adults: management — Recommendations
source.population: Adults with known or suspected generalised anxiety disorder or panic disorder.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist mental-health care.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult GAD identification, assessment, stepped care, risk, and clinician-led management; not exact for children, every anxiety subtype, or UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.2–1.2.11 — identification, assessment, education, and monitoring

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports anxiety and worry history, duration, distress, functional impairment, comorbid depression or anxiety, substance use, medical and treatment history, education, and active monitoring.

added_items.rationale: Supports anxiety symptoms, duration, function, comorbidity and monitoring for caffeine and anxiety documentation; no decision is generated.

added_items.final_wording: Supports caffeine, nicotine, medication, substance, sleep-apnoea, restless-legs, pain, withdrawal, thyroid, dyspnoea, mood, anxiety, life-stress, bedtime-worry, environmental, and sleep-habit review plus selected tests when clinically indicated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Insomnia
source.population: Adults with difficulty initiating or maintaining sleep or early waking with daytime impact.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth insomnia history, red flags, causes, and clinician-led management; fixed follow-up intervals and autonomous medication choices are not supported.

exact_location.heading: Section 7 — substances, medicines, comorbidity, environment, and selected tests

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports caffeine, nicotine, medication, substance, sleep-apnoea, restless-legs, pain, withdrawal, thyroid, dyspnoea, mood, anxiety, life-stress, bedtime-worry, environmental, and sleep-habit review plus selected tests when clinically indicated.

added_items.rationale: Supports clinician-entered substance and sleep-context documentation for caffeine and anxiety documentation; no decision is generated.
